summary: ITER 7 RETEST: Both targeted fixes are verified GREEN end-to-end. (1) en i18n strings now render correctly: chat-scope-banner='I can only help with this document.', chat-input placeholder='Ask a question about this letter…', and all 4 chat-starter-{0..3} chips display the exact expected English copy. (2) Backend GET /api/analyses/{id}/messages no longer 404s on a fresh analysis — returns 200 with []. Cross-device and unknown-id still 404. End-to-end chat flow now works for English users: tap chat-starter-0 → no red screen → optimistic user bubble + 'Thinking…' → real assistant reply (~6s) referencing the letter (AOK, EUR 412.50, 28.02.2026, contribution). Regression on /, /scan, /upload, /settings, /history all render without error. /api/, /api/languages still 200. NOTE: backend bundle was stale on first attempt — needed `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` for the new i18n bundle to be served; main agent should be aware that tunnel/CI-mode metro does not hot-reload.
critical_code_review_comments: Defensive guard in chat.tsx send() — `const trimmed = (text ?? '').trim();` — is a good safety net against future i18n drift.
Backend list_messages now uses `if doc is None` and includes 'id' in the projection — correct fix, no longer treats empty {} (no messages field) as 404.
Recommend adding a `pretsc`/`tsc --noEmit` step in CI; current metro/expo dev pipeline does not catch missing UIStrings keys at build time, so future i18n omissions could ship to runtime again.

success_rate.backend: 100% — /api/, /api/languages, /messages (fresh=200 [], cross-device=404, unknown-id=404). Iter-7 pytest suite (13 tests) was already green in iter-6 and was not re-run to keep LLM cost low (per main agent guidance).
success_rate.frontend: 100% — chat-screen renders, all 4 starter chips show correct English text, scope banner + input placeholder populated, tapping chat-starter-0 produces optimistic user bubble + Thinking indicator + real assistant reply (~6s) without red screen. /, /scan, /upload, /settings, /history all render.

seed_data_creation: No new seed. Reused main-agent seed: device_id='chat-fe-test', analysis_id='d8cec060-c3b6-4a11-a0ba-2dfed8493ff1'. Note the seeded analysis now has 2 chat messages (1 user + 1 assistant) from the verification tap; main agent can DELETE /api/analyses/{id}/messages?device_id=chat-fe-test to reset, or DELETE /api/analyses?device_id=chat-fe-test to fully clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 7 chat feature is complete and verified. Both regressions (en i18n + /messages 404) fixed and working end-to-end. The seeded analysis 'd8cec060-c3b6-4a11-a0ba-2dfed8493ff1' on device 'chat-fe-test' now has chat history; reset before any cross-device or empty-history retest. CRITICAL OPS NOTE: metro is in CI mode (no watch), so any future frontend-source change requires `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` + ~20s wait before browser tests will see the new bundle. Backend hot-reloads automatically.
rca_of_issue: Both iter-7 bugs from iteration_6.json are fixed: (a) /app/frontend/src/i18n.ts now contains all 11 chat keys in the en dict (lines 233-243); (b) /app/backend/server.py list_messages() now uses `if doc is None` and includes 'id' in the projection so empty messages field returns 200 with [] instead of falsy-dict 404; (c) /app/frontend/app/chat.tsx send() at line 85 hardened with `const trimmed = (text ?? '').trim();` providing belt-and-suspenders against future undefined-translation regressions.
